div1.entryFree: Sufficiency, adequate qualification, ability: then no more remains but that to your s. Meas. I, 1, 8. but no man's virtue nor s. to be so moral when he shall endure the like himself, Ado V, 1, 29. whom you know of stuffed s. Wint. II, 1, 185. a substitute of most allowed s. Oth. I, 3, 224.
